name: Kusuriuri - Mononoke
description:
Two Kusuriuri’s?!?! (Ri & Kon!)

All alone with your master’s medicine box, all of the sudden he returns looking vaguely different. Nothing seems wrong until HE RETURNS!!! Now who was the man you were speaking to??
